properties.description: Executes the trace_logs_bronze_to_silver notebook on a scheduled basis to move trace log data from the Bronze to Silver Lakehouse. By default processes the previous 24 hours; windowStart and windowEnd parameters allow custom date ranges.

activities.name: Set_effectiveWindowStart
activities.description: Resolves the start of the processing window. Uses the pipeline parameter if supplied; otherwise defaults to 24 hours before the current UTC time.

activities.name: Set_effectiveWindowEnd
activities.description: Resolves the end of the processing window. Uses the pipeline parameter if supplied; otherwise defaults to the current UTC time.

activities.name: Execute_trace_logs_bronze_to_silver
activities.description: Runs the trace_logs_bronze_to_silver notebook with the resolved event date window. Retries up to 2 times on transient failures.

windowStart.description: Inclusive start of the event_time window to process (ISO-8601 datetime string, e.g. '2024-06-01 00:00:00'). Leave empty to default to 24 hours before run time.

windowEnd.description: Exclusive end of the event_time window to process (ISO-8601 datetime string, e.g. '2024-06-02 00:00:00'). Leave empty to default to current run time.
